description: Composition Green kurta made of a blended fabric, has a scooped neckline with a mock button closure and big fabric covered buttons, short sleeves, and floral print in lilac and pink embroidered on the neckline and chest Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only Vintage weaves, classic cuts and contemporary style - all come together in this kurta from diva. Crafted from a soft blended fabric, it offers exemplary comfort all day. Pair it with patialas or churidars and embellished slippers for an ethnic look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5’9”, chest 33” and shoulders 15.5”
